name: H-E-B
description: Exports your H-E-B account profile, order history, and product nutrition data using Playwright browser automation.

scopes.label: Account profile
scopes.description: Your name, email, phone number, and saved delivery addresses

scopes.label: Order history
scopes.description: Curbside and delivery orders with item names, quantities, prices, and order dates

scopes.label: Product nutrition
scopes.description: Nutrition facts (calories, macros, sodium, fiber, vitamins) for each product ordered. Aligned to Schema.org NutritionInformation.
